name: John Price & Vladimir Makarov | Hate Sex
description:
Non Military AU! (explained fully in intro) | Price and Makarov angry fuck, User walks in on them

It's purposefully vague whether User is Price's or Makarov's subordinate!

Original modern warfare Price and Makarov... I think I made Price a little bit too mean.

Okayy.... Me 'n Pax 'n Kosh messed around a bit ... and now we have a bot :3
I really hope it works well, let me know if it does/doesn't.
creator: Oririri
